chapters.title: The Hacker Mindset 🧠
chapters.description: Uncover what ethical hacking truly means. Learn the difference between good and bad actors, and set up your mental toolkit for the journey ahead.

chapters.title: Networking 101: The Internet's Plumbing 🌐
chapters.description: Packets, protocols, and pings! Understand how data actually travels so you can intercept and analyze it later.

chapters.title: Linux Survival Guide 🐧
chapters.description: The terminal is your weapon. Master essential Linux commands, permissions, and scripting to control the digital battlefield.

chapters.title: Footprinting & Reconnaissance 👣
chapters.description: Information is ammunition. Learn passive and active techniques to gather intel on your target without being detected.

chapters.title: Scanning & Enumeration 🧬
chapters.description: Knock on every door and window. Discover live hosts, open ports, and running services to find your entry point.

chapters.title: Vulnerability Analysis 🔬
chapters.description: Separate noise from danger. Learn to map discovered services to known weaknesses using industry-standard frameworks.

chapters.title: System Exploitation 💥
chapters.description: The art of the breach. Understand memory corruption, payloads, and gaining that first precious foothold.

chapters.title: Web Application Hacking 🌍
chapters.description: Where the money is. Master the OWASP Top 10: SQL Injection, XSS, CSRF, and broken access control.

chapters.title: Wi-Fi & Network Attacks 📶
chapters.description: Cut the cord. Dive into packet injection, de-authentication attacks, and cracking wireless encryption keys.

chapters.title: Social Engineering 🎭
chapters.description: The human element is the weakest link. Master phishing, pretexting, and the psychology of trust.

chapters.title: Post-Exploitation & Pivoting 🕵️
chapters.description: You're in. Now what? Maintain access, clean your tracks, and move laterally through the network like a ghost.

chapters.title: Reporting & The Career Path 📝
chapters.description: Turn technical findings into business risk. Learn how to write a professional pentest report and land your first job.
